title: How Iran Gained Leverage in the War
summary_full: Outmatched militarily, Iran used “triangular coercion” by attacking Gulf states and closing the Strait of Hormuz. It points to a long-term U.S. vulnerability.
summary_public: Outmatched militarily, Iran used “triangular coercion” by attacking Gulf states and closing the Strait of Hormuz. It points to a long-term U.S. vulnerability.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iran used “triangular coercion” by attacking Gulf states and closing the Strait of Hormuz
